name: Shrimp Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Wash and remove stems from mushrooms. Chop stems finely and set aside.
3. Heat margarine or oil in a medium-sized skillet. Add mushroom stems, onions, and red peppers. Cook until tender.
4. Remove from heat and add shrimp.
5. Stuff mushroom caps with this mixture and place on an ungreased baking dish.
6. Combine cheese, cumin, parsley, pepper, and oregano in a small bowl. Sprinkle over mushrooms.
7. Bake for 20 minutes or until thoroughly cooked.
Prep time: 35 minutes
